series_metadata.series_description: A) Original contractual agreements with consultants. B) Originals of agreements and reports - general: ie memberships with broadcast organizations, contracts with vendors, auditor's reports, Commission's comments to the FCC, tower negotiations, leases, maintenance agreements. C) Agreements with affiliated stations: tower agreements and leases, subsidy agreements, miscellaneous agreements. D) Letters of agreement for production grants with affiliated stations. E) Medical Microwave Contractual Agreements - original contracts re engineering work on system, maintenance, tower agreements, supplier (equipment) agreements, HEW grants, transfer of administrative operation to Ohio University, etc.
